creator: daniel@blodan.se
text:
Created attachment 209694
Updates port to 0.26.0

This update has a few changes to the port itself due to mozilla has stopped releasing their source code on github. 
So I've changed the port to fetch it from mozilla central

Attached patch passes poudriere testport

Attached patch has a warning about using DISTFILES with portlint -AC but if i don't specify DISTFILES it wont pull in the zip so I'm thinking it'a false positive

Changelog:
https://github.com/mozilla/geckodriver/releases
